name: Lamb Chops with Gorgonzola (Pjxg05a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the lamb chops with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
2. Wrap exposed bones with aluminum foil so they do not burn.
3. Grill the lamb to your desired temperature.
4. For the sauce: Add wine to a saucepot and reduce by half.
5. Add heavy cream and reduce on medium heat until thickened.
6. Whisk in cheese and butter until incorporated.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
This is served with Fresh Horseradish Mashed Potatoes (recipe listed under that title).
